title: Fresh Flaky Carrot Stir-Fry
description: A healthy and satisfying solo-dinner Cantonese dish featuring fresh carrots cooked in a flavorful sauce with minimal additions.

ingredients.name: 3 medium-sized carrots
ingredients.notes: peeled and sliced into thin rounds

instructions: Wash and peel the carrots, then slice them into thin rounds.
In a bowl, mix the minced garlic with lime juice and soy sauce. Add salt to taste.
Heat a pan over medium-high heat. When hot, add a bit of oil, followed by the sliced carrots.
Sauté until the carrots start to soften but still have some crunch, about 5 minutes.
Pour in the prepared garlic-lime-soy mixture and stir everything together evenly.
Cook for another 2-3 minutes until most of the liquid is absorbed, creating a nice glaze on top of the vegetables.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course. Can be paired with steamed rice or noodles.
